content:
2 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Des Traynor looked at the relationship between companies and customers..
And found a disconnect..
Marketing sent emails..
Sales made calls..
Support answered tickets..
Customer Success checked in later..
Every conversation lived in a different system..
The customer experienced one company..
But internally the business acted like four different companies..
That fragmentation created friction..
Slow replies..
Lost context..
Frustrated users..
Missed opportunities..
So he helped build Intercom..
A customer messaging platform built around the entire customer journey..
From the first website visit..
To onboarding..
To customer support..
To long-term success..
Everything connected..
Then AI changed the landscape..
Instead of simply routing conversations..
AI began answering common questions..
Summarizing customer history..
Helping support teams resolve issues faster..
Not replacing people..
Removing repetitive work..
So human teams could focus on problems that actually required human judgment..
That’s the real transformation..
Not another chat widget..
An intelligent communication layer..
Because every interaction teaches the system..
Every conversation improves future responses..
Every resolved issue strengthens the customer experience..
Intercom wasn’t selling messaging software..
It was reducing friction between businesses and the people they serve..
Here’s what Des Traynor understood..
1.. Every customer conversation is part of one continuous relationship..
People don’t care which department they’re talking to..
2.. AI works best when it removes repetition — not empathy..
Automation should speed up service, not eliminate human connection..
3.. Great communication compounds customer trust..
Fast, clear responses often matter as much as product quality..
Lesson:
Don’t just build a better product..
Build a better conversation around the product..
Because businesses grow when customers feel understood..
Not just supported..
That’s exactly what I amplify..
Solving real audio related problems in your business..
👉 santelmomusic.com
